domain_archetypes.name: ai-native evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: ai-native signal changes while depends context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: depends boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: depends handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: remembering regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: remembering behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: buyer operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: buyer output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
